sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 59:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 59:1
items.html: Because in Partzuf SAG, the degrees and ZON of Keter here descended, similar to ZON of Hochma of AB. Also, ZON of Hochma here are similar to ZON of Bina in Partzuf AB. Hence, ZON of Hochma here contain only the phase of VAK of Hochma, similar to the male of Bina of AB, and the female is only a record, similar to the female of Bina of AB, called Dalet. The male, which is VAK, is called Vav, since every VAK is called Vav and not Yod. Still, in themselves they are sometimes called Yod-Hey, like ZON of Bina of AB. (Inner Light, Item‎ 61)
